calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-10-2020 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT .
Off Calendar Jan-02-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Carneice Hall-Johnson, 415-567-8182 Plaintiff in Pro Per.
Jonathan Rolnick, Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-3800 of the Office of the City Attorney for Defendant CCSF.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court shares its views. Plaintiff gives the Court a courtesy copy of her brief. Plaintiff argues. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Granted. Defendant to prepare a proposed in compliance with CCP 437c(g) and CRC 3.1312. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
